slices.title: Standard prompt finalization
slices.goal: Generate prompt.md from origin_prompt.md and persist it.
acceptance: prompt.md exists and reflects origin_prompt.md requirements
slices.rollback_plan: Use git diff to review and revert prompt.md only if requested.
slices.human_override: Developer can pause or replace prompt.md at any time.
slices.next_condition: SLICE-002 may begin after prompt.md is written.

slices.title: Infrastructure repository generation
slices.goal: Create repository directories, docs, schemas, skills, scripts, and core CLI code.
slices.rollback_plan: Review git diff and revert generated files only if requested.
slices.human_override: Developer can remove or restructure generated infrastructure after review.

slices.title: Quality gate verification
slices.goal: Run infrastructure check and unit tests, then record evidence.
acceptance: test report contains executed commands and results
slices.rollback_plan: If validation fails, keep evidence and mark needs_rework.
slices.human_override: Developer can accept known limitations only with explicit confirmation.

slices.title: Origin prompt Knowledge Base/RAG optimization
slices.goal: Optimize origin_prompt.md to include the independent Vibe Coding programming Knowledge Base/RAG infrastructure mechanism without weakening existing semantics.
verification: origin_prompt.md contains required Knowledge Base/RAG concepts
acceptance: origin_prompt.md reflects REQ-0005 and preserves existing governance semantics
slices.rollback_plan: Review git diff and revert only this slice's edits if explicitly requested.
slices.human_override: Developer can replace or narrow the Knowledge Base/RAG requirement.
slices.next_condition: Future changes require a new requirement, decision record, and execution slice.

slices.title: Prompt and Knowledge Base/RAG infrastructure resync
slices.goal: Regenerate prompt.md semantics from the optimized origin_prompt.md and extend the infrastructure repository with a dedicated Knowledge Base/RAG core scaffold.
verification: prompt contains required Knowledge Base/RAG terms
acceptance: prompt.md reflects optimized origin_prompt.md Knowledge Base/RAG requirements
infrastructure exposes local knowledge import, search, and evidence answer primitives
slices.rollback_plan: Review git diff and revert only SLICE-005 files if explicitly requested.
audit_evidence: git diff -- prompt.md README.md docs schemas vibe_coding_infra tests
slices.human_override: Developer can narrow the Knowledge Base/RAG scaffold or request a different backend design.
slices.next_condition: All current slices are complete. Future changes require a new requirement, decision record, and execution slice.
